(inform
  :sender monitor-agent
  :receiver incident-response-agent
  :content "((incident-alert
    (service payments-service)
    (severity 2)
    (priority-level 4)
    (condition (latency > 2s))
    (causal-chain
      (high-latency caused-by database-connection-pool-exhaustion)
      (database-connection-pool-exhaustion caused-by traffic-spike))
    (resolution-recommendation
      (immediately scale-out payments-service)
      (increase database connection pool capacity)
      (apply traffic throttling and monitor latency until < 2s))))"
  :reply-with incident-alert-001
  :in-reply-to none
  :language SL
  :ontology incident-management
)
